name: On The Dunes Sports
about: On The Dunes Sports is a premier entertainment and sports venue located in Commerce Township, Michigan. The facility offers a mix of indoor and outdoor activities, including golf simulators, axe throwing, football bowling, sand volleyball, and racing simulators, designed for groups, parties, and family fun. Guests can play world-famous golf courses, join leagues, or book events for a unique experience year-round. With a focus on providing a wide variety of sports under one roof, the venue caters to both casual players and serious golfers seeking high-tech simulation experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to world-famous golf courses without leaving Metro Detroit
Premium golf simulator technology for realistic play and practice
Ideal for both casual rounds and serious practice sessions

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service available with a dedicated $10 lunch menu served daily from 11am to 2pm

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium golf simulator technology for realistic course play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent equipment on-site. The facility provides all necessary gear for golf simulator play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has its own full kitchen and bar serving food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, On The Dunes Sports is family-friendly with activities suitable for all ages, including kids.
